selections.name: Hard To Figure
selections.reason: Elite speed figures at SA, dropping to a highly competitive spot. Top trainer/jockey combo of Papaprodromou and Hernandez.

selections.name: Mighty Kai
selections.reason: Highly consistent dirt router with excellent tactical speed and solid speed figures in the 90s.

selections.name: Habeas
selections.reason: Coming off a strong win at Los Alamitos and possesses the early speed to secure a great position.

selections.name: Pioneer Prince
selections.reason: Classy individual switching from turf to dirt for Doug O'Neill. Must be respected on the class drop.

danger_horse.name: Cowboy Mike
danger_horse.reason: Dangerous stalker who can capitalize if the early pace melts down.

selections.name: Red Cherry
selections.reason: Drops out of the Grade 2 Santa Anita Oaks. Possesses excellent tactical speed and should control the pace.

selections.name: Peppermint Dash
selections.reason: Sensational debut winner on turf at Santa Anita. Drawn perfectly inside with massive upside.

selections.name: Soul Sister
selections.reason: Strong speed figures and coming off a professional maiden victory at Santa Anita.

selections.name: Victorious Dream
selections.reason: Irish-bred filly with Umberto Rispoli aboard. Always dangerous in turf routes.

danger_horse.name: Struck By Her
danger_horse.reason: Solid third behind Red Cherry last time and should improve with a cleaner trip.

exotic_strategy.strategy: Win Bet #2, Exacta Box 1-2, Trifecta 1,2 / 1,2,5 / ALL

selections.name: Charlie's Clock
selections.reason: Shipper from Churchill Downs with a strong debut performance on a wet track. Gets fast dirt and Juan Hernandez.

selections.name: Billy Goat
selections.reason: Solid debut fourth at Santa Anita. Should show natural progression for Doug O'Neill.

selections.name: Boss Man Bolt
selections.reason: Third on debut behind a next-out winner. Working well for Mick Ruis.

selections.name: Lost Angeles
selections.reason: First-time starter by Jimmy Creed. McCarthy and Rispoli are a lethal combination with debutants.

danger_horse.name: Free Solo
danger_horse.reason: Well-bred Munnings colt debuting with Mike Smith aboard.

selections.name: Doncic
selections.reason: Boasts the fastest turf sprint figures in the field. Extremely consistent and loves this distance.

selections.name: Code Duello
selections.reason: Highly consistent turf sprinter drawn perfectly inside. Will save ground and launch a strong bid.

selections.name: Smart Code
selections.reason: In peak form with strong tactical speed. Ricardo Gonzalez knows this horse well.

selections.name: Gregory's Pride
selections.reason: D'Amato trainee with solid speed figures. Always a major threat in Southern California turf sprints.

danger_horse.name: Nasty Habit
danger_horse.reason: Classy dirt sprinter switching to turf with plenty of back class.

selections.name: Sauced Up
selections.reason: Proven experience with a strong second-place finish last out at Santa Anita, earning a 75 speed figure.

selections.name: Tijuana Money
selections.reason: Fast figures from Turf Paradise. Kazushi Kimura takes the mount for Peter Miller.

selections.name: Looks Like N Angel
selections.reason: First-time starter by McKinzie. Working exceptionally well at Santa Anita.

selections.name: Rosa's Miracle
selections.reason: Well-bred debutant for John Sadler with Joel Rosario in the irons.

danger_horse.name: On Broadway
danger_horse.reason: Firster by Nashville who has shown good gate speed in morning works.

selections.name: Maaz
selections.reason: Class of the field. Drops out of graded stakes company and gets Umberto Rispoli on the turf.

selections.name: Detain
selections.reason: Juddmonte import with excellent tactical speed. Solid third last out at Santa Anita.

selections.name: Charlie's To Blame
selections.reason: Highly consistent runner with speed figures regularly reaching the triple digits.

selections.name: Watsonville
selections.reason: Grade 3 winner returning to his preferred distance. Major threat on his best day.

danger_horse.name: Sarwar
danger_horse.reason: Saves ground from the rail and has back class that fits this group.

selections.name: Hondo Crouch
selections.reason: Extremely consistent claiming router with the best speed figures in the field.

selections.name: Redial
selections.reason: Excellent recent form at Santa Anita and fits perfectly at this claiming level.

selections.name: Curly's Agenda
selections.reason: Won nicely last out and is on an upward trajectory. Kyle Frey retains the mount.

selections.name: Skyquist
selections.reason: Consistent performer who should get a great stalking trip from the outside.

danger_horse.name: Circuit Breaker
danger_horse.reason: CD shipper coming off a maiden win. Must respect the class transition.

selections.name: Mr. A. P.
selections.reason: Elite Grade 1 class. Second in the Breeders' Cup Juvenile and easily the horse to beat on class.

selections.name: Later Than Planned
selections.reason: Excellent stakes form with high speed figures. Hector Berrios rides for Philip D'Amato.

selections.name: Charlie's Curlin
selections.reason: Highly consistent turf router with Cinema Stakes form. Juan Hernandez takes the mount.

selections.name: Bust Out
selections.reason: In peak form for Michael McCarthy. Jaramillo retains the mount after a strong win.

danger_horse.name: Proletariat
danger_horse.reason: Strong winner last out at Santa Anita and possesses a powerful late kick.

selections.name: Frank Bullitt
selections.reason: Boasts the best recent speed figures (99, 102) and is highly consistent at this distance.

selections.name: Matt At Five
selections.reason: High speed figures and gets the services of Joel Rosario. Major win threat.

selections.name: Moment Of Valor
selections.reason: Huge debut winner with tons of upside. Armando Ayuso rides for Peter Eurton.

selections.name: Rodrigoknows
selections.reason: Veteran with significant back class. Drawn well on the rail to save ground.

danger_horse.name: Its A Cinch
danger_horse.reason: Consistent runner who will be flying late if the pace is contested.

selections.name: Ulysses Rose
selections.reason: Massive class drop from graded stakes. Juan Hernandez rides for Michael McCarthy.

selections.name: Goodies
selections.reason: Highly consistent with a big speed figure (95) last out. Hector Berrios retains the mount.

selections.name: Pentle Bay
selections.reason: Strong second last out at Santa Anita. Improving with every start.

selections.name: Peachy Canyon
selections.reason: Rispoli on the turf is always a major threat. Highly consistent runner.

danger_horse.name: Golden Hope
danger_horse.reason: Solid second last out and should get a perfect ground-saving trip from the inside.
